# PHCollectionListSubtype.momentListYear

**Case**

The collection list is a moment year, grouping all moments from one or more calendar years.

## Declaration

```swift
case momentListYear
```

## Discussion

This subtype applies only to collection lists whose type is [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHCollectionListType/momentList].

## Constants

- **PHCollectionListSubtype.momentListCluster**: The collection list is a moment cluster, grouping several related moments.
- **PHCollectionListSubtype.regularFolder**: The collection list is a folder containing albums or other folders.
- **PHCollectionListSubtype.smartFolderEvents**: The collection list is a smart folder containing one or more Events synced from iPhoto.
- **PHCollectionListSubtype.smartFolderFaces**: The collection list is a smart folder containing one or more Faces synced from iPhoto.
- **PHCollectionListSubtype.any**: Use this value to fetch collection lists of all possible subtypes.
